title: Chat
noDeviceHint: Open Devices in the sidebar and connect a CLI before chatting.
newChatHint: Start a new conversation or pick one from the sidebar.

input.placeholderStreaming: Agent replying: Enter to steer, Shift+Enter to queue

inputPlaceholder: Type a message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
inputPlaceholderSteer: Agent running: use steer / follow_up to interrupt or append
streamingHint: Agent is running. Wait for prompt; steer interrupts, follow_up appends.
errorCliUnreachable: Cannot reach CLI. Ensure muse start is running and the device is online.
errorSseSubscribeFailed: Could not subscribe to session events (HTTP {{status}}).
turnInterrupted: Connection interrupted before the turn finished
turnInterruptedTool: Tool did not finish (CLI restarted or disconnected)
cliHealthLost: CLI unreachable. Sending paused until it recovers…

noDevice.title: Connect a CLI device
noDevice.subtitle: Chat connects directly to a local or remote CLI daemon. Follow these steps to pair.
noDevice.step1Body: Open the Devices page and generate a pair code (valid for a few minutes).
noDevice.step2Body: On the machine running muse start, run (replace <code> with your pair code):
noDevice.step3Body: After pairing succeeds, return to Devices and click Connect.

compactOverflowHint: Context was full and has been compacted. Please send your message again.

contextPanel.sessionHint: Cumulative per turn; total includes cache tokens, not just sent + received
contextPanel.pendingHint: Refreshes after you send the next message
contextPanel.inputTooltip: Content sent to the model, including messages and system prompt
contextPanel.cacheReadTooltip: Repeated content read from cache — not billed again
contextPanel.cacheWriteTooltip: Content written to cache — saves cost on future reuse
contextPanel.totalTooltip: Sum of all turns in this session (including cache tokens)
contextPanel.lastTurnHitRateTooltip: Higher hit rate means better cache reuse and lower cost
contextPanel.sessionHitRateTooltip: Cache hit rate across all turns in this session
contextPanel.compactHint: Summarize older messages to free context space

sessionTreeHint: Click a turn to switch branch; hover a node to fork
